vital.name: Altar of Echoes
vital.description: An ancient stone altar where whispers of forgotten rituals echo endlessly

tiers.name: Approach
tiers.description: The outer courtyard, overtaken by pale moss

tiers.name: Chamber
tiers.description: A circular chamber with carved symbols on the walls

tiers.name: Heart
tiers.description: The innermost sanctum where the altar rests

vital.name: Bone Garden
vital.description: A field where ancient bones rise from the earth in geometric patterns

tiers.name: Periphery
tiers.description: The outer edge where bones first appear

tiers.name: Grove
tiers.description: Denser formations of bone and petrified wood

tiers.name: Nexus
tiers.description: The center where all patterns converge

vital.name: Mirror Pool
vital.description: A perfectly still body of water that reflects things that aren't there

tiers.name: Shore
tiers.description: The beach of pale sand leading to the water

tiers.name: Shallows
tiers.description: Where water and land blur together

tiers.name: Depths
tiers.description: The center of the pool where reflection breaks

minor.name: Twisted Grove
minor.description: A forest of gnarled trees growing in impossible spirals

minor.name: Stone Circle
minor.description: Ancient megaliths arranged in a perfect circle

minor.name: Crystal Cave
minor.description: A cavern filled with luminescent crystals

minor.name: Rust Ravine
minor.description: A deep gorge stained with oxide and ancient metal deposits

minor.name: Listening Hill
minor.description: A rise where the wind carries voices from distant places
